blog.spotlightTitle: Turkey's Defense Export Growth: NATO Standards Meet Global Demand
blog.spotlightBodyPrimary: Turkey's defense industry has experienced remarkable growth, with domestic production capacity now covering over 80% of military requirements. Turkish manufacturers consistently produce equipment to NATO, AQAP, and MIL-STD specifications, making them globally competitive procurement sources.
blog.spotlightBodySecondary: At Sultan Defense, we act as the bridge between Turkey's elite defense manufacturers and armed forces worldwide. Our deep industry relationships and compliance expertise ensure that every procurement transaction is legally sound, logistically precise, and operationally effective.

about.title: About Sultan Defense
about.description: Sultan Defense Ltd., Co. is a premier global supplier and procurement partner in the defense and military sector, established in 1996.
about.intro: Strategically headquartered in Turkey, we leverage the Turkish defense industry's rapidly expanding production capacity, cutting-edge R&D strength, and innovative technologies to bridge advanced military engineering with the critical needs of our clients worldwide.

legal.title: Legal
legal.privacyDesc: Overview of how Sultan Defense handles contact, quotation and procurement data in compliance with KVKK and GDPR.
legal.privacyContent:
Sultan Defense Ltd., Co. uses submitted contact and quotation data only to evaluate procurement requests, prepare offers and maintain supply chain communication.

We do not request unnecessary personal data and we limit access to procurement files, technical documents and client credentials to relevant operational teams.

For data updates or removal requests, you can contact us at export@sultandefense.com.
legal.termsDesc: General terms for using the Sultan Defense website, product catalog and procurement communication channels.
legal.termsContent:
Information published on this website is provided for general informational and procurement guidance purposes. Sultan Defense is a procurement partner, not a direct manufacturer.

Product images are representational only and may belong to their respective manufacturers. No ownership or copyright is claimed.

All procurement inquiries are subject to export compliance review and valid End-User Certificate (EUC) requirements before any commitment is made.

seo.defaultTitle: Sultan Defense | A to Z Defense Procurement & Tactical Equipment
seo.defaultDescription: Sultan Defense provides comprehensive A to Z military procurement solutions, supplying tactical gear and defense technologies to the Middle East, Africa, and Turkic Republics.
